summary: Final Commercial Flow Pack testing complete. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend features verified: My Account page with Personal/Business toggle, phone prefix dropdowns, up to 3 delivery addresses; Marketplace with 3 tabs (Products, Services, Promotional Materials); Cart drawer with quantity controls, VAT breakdown (18%), checkout flow with 'Same as contact' toggle; Orders split-view with Table/Card toggle showing human-readable status labels (Unpaid, Payment Under Review, Paid, Processing); AI Chat widget correctly hides when cart is open.

ui_bugs.issue: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps Place Order button at bottom of cart drawer checkout step - requires force click or scroll to access

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps Complete Payment button at bottom of drawer - same issue as iteration 96

critical_code_review_comments: final_commercial_flow_routes.py correctly implements all profile and commercial flow endpoints with proper MongoDB integration
MyAccountPageV2.jsx properly implements Personal/Business toggle, phone prefix dropdowns, up to 3 delivery addresses with default selection
CartDrawerCompleteFlow.jsx correctly implements 4-step flow: cart → checkout → payment → confirmation with 'Same as contact' toggle
OrdersSplitView.jsx correctly implements table/card toggle with human-readable status labels from preview.status_label
MarketplaceUnifiedPageV3.jsx correctly implements 3 tabs: Products, Services, Promotional Materials with adaptive search
AIChatWidget.jsx correctly listens to 'konekt-cart-state' event and hides when cart is open
Status label mapping in backend correctly converts raw statuses to human-readable labels (pending_payment → Unpaid, payment_proof_uploaded → Payment Under Review, etc.)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all flows verified, minor overlay issue with Emergent badge)

seed_data_creation: Test profile data and orders created during backend tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Final Commercial Flow Pack fully tested. Key features: 1) My Account page at /account/my-account with Personal/Business toggle, phone prefix dropdowns, up to 3 delivery addresses with default selection 2) Marketplace at /account/marketplace with 3 tabs (Products, Services, Promotional Materials), adaptive search, lazy loading 3) Cart drawer (CartDrawerCompleteFlow) with quantity controls, VAT breakdown (18%), 4-step flow (cart → checkout → payment → confirmation), 'Same as contact' toggle 4) Orders split-view at /account/orders with Table/Card toggle, human-readable status labels 5) AI Chat widget hides when cart is open via 'konekt-cart-state' event. Known issue: 'Made with Emergent' badge overlaps Place Order button in cart drawer.
